/usr/bin/ar qc libATCPU.a CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co6502machine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co65802.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co6809.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co8048.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/co8051.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/coz80.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/decode6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/decode65816.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/decode6809.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/decodez80.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/memorymap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ATCPU.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libATCPU.a
